purpose: Assign bounded work to Cursor, Codex, Claude, local OSS agents, or other helpers without flattening training lanes or colliding on shared files.

template.goal: One sentence describing the bounded outcome.
inputs: Exact file paths, reports, or ledger rows the agent should use.
dependencies: Run npm run training:run-ledger first if the task depends on current run state.
done_criteria: Verification command and result are included.
Training data, eval data, routing, and merge impacts are explicitly stated.
No launch, publish, send, model promotion, quantization, or broad merge was performed.

return_format.lane_impact: none | training_data | eval_data | routing | merge_logic | docs_only
